---
title: "Cutaneous HPV is transcriptionally quiet in skin and carcinoma but productive in warts: a depth-controlled re-mining of public RNA-seq"
author: "[Authors to be added]"
date: last-modified
bibliography: references.bib
crossref:
  custom:
    - kind: float
      key: suppfig
      reference-prefix: "Figure S"
      space-before-numbering: false
      latex-env: suppfig
    - kind: float
      key: supptbl
      reference-prefix: "Table S"
      space-before-numbering: false
      latex-env: supptbl
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: false
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
# Reproducible numbers: results_models.R re-fits M1/M2/M3 from the pipeline
# outputs and builds `stats`; _helpers.R adds formatters + table builders.
# Every quoted figure below is rendered inline (`r ...`) from these.
library(tidyverse); library(here); library(knitr)
invisible(capture.output(source(here("manuscript/results_models.R"))))
source(here("manuscript/_helpers.R"))
# Bayesian posterior summaries are precomputed by manuscript/bayesian_models.R
# (MCMC, ~40s) and read here, so the render itself stays fast/deterministic.
bayes <- readRDS(here("manuscript/bayes_summary.rds"))
bget  <- function(m) as.list(bayes[bayes$model == m, ])
```

{{< include _abstract.qmd >}}

{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include _methods.qmd >}}

{{< include _results.qmd >}}

{{< include _discussion.qmd >}}

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

{{< include _supplement.qmd >}}
